title: arctostaphylos uva-ursi subsp. nummularia
intro: Arctostaphylos uva-ursi subsp. nummularia, also known as Kinnikinnick or Mountain Cranberry, is a shrub plant species belonging to the family Ericaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties due to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos uva-ursi subsp. nummularia include its ability to soothe urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. Arctostaphylos uva-ursi subsp. nummularia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
